   ```c
       return err;
   }
   ```

   ```c

   ```

The code snippet includes proper error handling and cleanup mechanisms. - For `adev->acp.acp_cell`: If `mfd_add_hotplug_devices` fails, the function returns without freeing `adev->acp.acp_cell` or `adev->acp.acp_res`.
